zh-CN.title: 记北疆自驾游路线
zh-CN.content:
DAY1：北京-乌鲁木齐

DAY2：乌鲁木齐-江布拉克，宿奇台县城

DAY3：奇台县城-天上五彩城，宿乌鲁木齐

DAY4-5：乌鲁木齐-可可托海，宿可可托海

DAY6：可可托海-五彩滩，宿哈巴河

DAY7：哈巴河-白哈巴，宿白哈巴

DAY8-9：白哈巴-喀纳斯湖，宿喀纳斯湖

DAY10：喀纳斯湖-禾木村，宿禾木村

DAY11：禾木村-克拉玛依，宿乌尔禾

DAY12：乌尔禾-乌鲁木齐-北京，回家。

en.title: A self-driving tour route in Northern Xinjiang
en.content:
DAY 1: Beijing - Urumqi

DAY 2: Urumqi - Jiangbulak, overnight in Qitai County

DAY 3: Qitai County - Colorful City in the Sky, overnight in Urumqi

DAY4-5: Urumqi - Koktokay, overnight in Koktokay

DAY 6: Keketuohai - Wucaitan, overnight in Habahe

DAY 7: Habahe - Baihaba, overnight in Baihaba

DAY 8-9: Baihaba - Kanas Lake, overnight at Kanas Lake

DAY 10: Kanas Lake - Hemu Village, overnight in Hemu Village

DAY 11: Hemu Village - Karamay, overnight in Urho

DAY 12: Urho - Urumqi - Beijing, home.
